notes: IFS 1.0.13 - actuator door stays OPEN and closes only once the plate is fully inside the chamber (firmware crash-guard blocks any close over an outside plate); Opta relay pin remap so relays actually switch (actuator=RELAY1, fan=RELAY2; plasma stays command-driven); auto-detect + auto-reconnect for Opta/Arduino and Silicon Labs CP210x, with remembered connections; tidier top connection bar (controls + one status line); app icon is now the IonField mark; honest Bioyond wording (servers reachable/ready, not 'bridged'). Signed (Augeas Technologies).
